description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Code Sanitizers that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has two jobs, linux_sanitizers and macos_sanitizers, which run on ubuntu-22.04 and macos-14 respectively. Each job uses a matrix strategy to run tests with different sanitizers, backends, and compilers. The jobs check out the repository, prepare the environment, build tests, run core and RPC tests, and generate reports.
